A view of the boathouses and slipways at the Marseille Marina in France on April 2, 2024Â /IC

Athletes train at the Marseille Marina for the Paris Olympics on July 25, 2024 in Marseille, France. /IC

The Mediterranean climate of Marseille offers mild winters and hot summers, with consistent wind conditions that are ideal for sailing. The sailing events for the Paris Olympics are taking place at Marseille Marina, one of the oldest ports in the Mediterranean. It has been a central hub of maritime activity and trade for centuries. Located in the south of France, the port is surrounded by a rich tapestry of cultural landmarks, including the Fort Saint-Jean, providing a stunning backdrop for the Olympic sailing events.

A view of the Qingdao International Sailing Center in Shandong Province on June 28, 2024 /CFP

A night view of the Qingdao International Sailing Center in Shandong Province on June 28, 2024 /CFP

In contrast, the Qingdao International Sailing Center, located on the east coast of China in Qingdao, Shandong Province, represents modernity and innovation. Constructed specifically for the 2008 Beijing Olympics, the center boasts state-of-the-art facilities and infrastructure designed to meet international sailing standards. The city of Qingdao, known as the "Sailing Capital of China," also has a strong maritime history and vibrant sailing community.

title: Olympic sailing venues: Marseille Marina and Qingdao Sailing Center - CGTN
author: CGTN
description: The sailing events for the Paris Olympics are taking place at Marseille Marina, a port steeped in history and renowned for its picturesque setting. In contrast, the Qingdao Olympic Sailing Center, which hosted the sailing events for the 2008 Beijing Olympics, offers a modern and meticulously designed venue.
